DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS -- NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE GENERAL OBJECTIONS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE IN THE RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AS TO DEFENDANTS INSITEVISION AND DR. CHANDRASEKARAN ARE STRICKEN. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS IS DENIED. THE RESPONSES ARE OTHERWISE SUFFICIENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2033(F)(1)(C). ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. (610/BCHAN)
